description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular wooden body with a rich, striped wood grain pattern on all visible surfaces, giving it a modern and elegant appearance. The front face is open, providing a single spacious shelf for storage, with no visible drawers or handles. The nightstand is supported by a pair of sleek, black metal legs that form a geometric, angular base, adding a contemporary industrial touch. The wood appears to be finished with a smooth, semi-gloss coating, enhancing the natural grain and providing a durable surface. The open shelf design makes it suitable for storing books, electronics, or small personal items. Its minimalist style and sturdy construction make it ideal for urban interiors, such as apartments or lofts.
description: A modern nightstand with a striped wood grain body, open front shelf, and angular black metal legs, featuring a minimalist and industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf and the full width of the wood grain top, with the black metal legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden body and the vertical striped grain, with the angular metal leg structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the open shelf, showing the depth of the storage space and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the wood grain and the geometric metal leg design.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
